parsed_jd.education_requirement: B.Tech/B.E. or equivalent in Computer Science
key_responsibilities: Design and develop high-performance RESTful APIs and microservices
Own architecture of payment processing pipelines
Build and maintain PostgreSQL schemas at scale
Containerize services with Docker and deploy on AWS using Kubernetes
Set up event-driven architectures using Kafka

candidate.name: Arjun Mehta
candidate.summary: Experienced backend engineer with 6 years building high-throughput payment systems at Razorpay.

shortlist.match_explanation: Arjun is an excellent match with all required and preferred skills. His 6 years of fintech experience at Razorpay directly align with the role requirements.

conversation.message: Hi Arjun! I'm reaching out from FinStack Technologies. We're building next-gen payment infrastructure and your experience at Razorpay caught our eye. Would you be open to a quick chat about a Senior Backend Engineer role?
Hey, thanks for reaching out! I've heard good things about FinStack. I'm not actively looking but always open to hearing about interesting opportunities in the payments space.

Great to hear! The role involves owning microservices architecture for our core payment systems — very similar tech stack to what you've worked with. We're offering 25-40L with ESOPs. Want me to share the full JD?
That sounds compelling. The scale and tech stack align well with what I enjoy working on. Sure, send over the JD and let's set up a call next week.

shortlist.interest_reasoning: Arjun shows strong interest due to domain alignment with his current fintech work and competitive compensation.

candidate.name: Meera Joshi
candidate.summary: Senior backend engineer at PhonePe working on payment gateway services.

shortlist.match_explanation: Meera has strong core skills and direct fintech payment experience at PhonePe. Missing Kafka and Kubernetes but otherwise an excellent fit.

conversation.message: Hi Meera! I'm from FinStack Technologies, a fintech startup in Bengaluru. Your work on payment gateways at PhonePe is impressive — we'd love to discuss a Senior Backend Engineer role with us.
Hi! Thanks for the note. I've actually been thinking about exploring startup opportunities. What kind of scale are we talking about?
We process INR 500 Cr+ monthly and growing fast. You'd own critical payment and reconciliation services. The tech stack is Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, AWS — right in your wheelhouse.
That's exciting! I love the idea of having more ownership. I'm definitely interested — can we schedule a call this week?

shortlist.interest_reasoning: Meera is actively looking for startup opportunities and shows genuine enthusiasm about the role and ownership.

candidate.name: Tanvi Bhatt
candidate.summary: Platform engineer at Razorpay building internal developer tools and API gateways.

shortlist.match_explanation: Tanvi has nearly all required skills plus Kubernetes. Her platform engineering background at Razorpay is highly relevant to the infrastructure needs of this role.

conversation.message: Hi Tanvi! I noticed your platform engineering work at Razorpay. We're building financial infrastructure at FinStack and think you'd be a great fit for our Senior Backend Engineer role.
Thanks for reaching out. I'm relatively happy at Razorpay, but I'm curious — what makes FinStack different?
We're at a smaller scale which means more ownership and impact. You'd be architecting systems from the ground up rather than maintaining existing ones. Plus ESOPs with real upside.
That's fair. I'm not in a rush to move but the ownership angle is interesting. Could you share more details via email? I'll review and get back.

shortlist.interest_reasoning: Tanvi is content in her current role but curious enough to continue the conversation. She needs more convincing.

candidate.name: Pooja Kulkarni
candidate.education: B.Tech IT, College of Engineering Pune
candidate.summary: Backend developer at Slice building credit card management APIs.

shortlist.match_explanation: Pooja has solid core skills and fintech experience at Slice. Slightly under on experience (3 vs 4 years required) and missing Kafka/K8s, but a strong growth candidate.

conversation.message: Hi Pooja! Your backend work at Slice is impressive. We're hiring a Senior Backend Engineer at FinStack Technologies — a fintech startup in Bengaluru. Interested?
Hi! Absolutely, I've been looking for my next challenge. The fintech space is where I want to grow. What does the role involve?
You'd be building payment processing microservices — Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, AWS. We also use Kafka and Kubernetes. It's a hybrid role in Bengaluru.
That sounds perfect! I don't have Kafka/K8s experience yet but I'm a fast learner and eager to level up. I'm available immediately — when can we talk?

shortlist.interest_reasoning: Pooja is highly enthusiastic and actively job seeking. Despite minor skill gaps, her eagerness and availability make her a strong candidate.

candidate.name: Siddharth Menon
candidate.summary: Backend engineer at Zerodha building trading platform APIs.

shortlist.match_explanation: Siddharth has strong Python and Django skills with fintech experience at Zerodha. Lacks FastAPI and AWS experience but has relevant domain knowledge in financial services.

conversation.message: Hi Siddharth! Your work on trading APIs at Zerodha is fascinating. We have a Senior Backend Engineer opening at FinStack Technologies — would you be open to a chat?
Hey, thanks. I'm somewhat open. What's the tech stack? I'm primarily a Django developer and would want to know if there's a learning curve.
We use FastAPI primarily, but your Django and Python skills transfer well. The role also involves PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, and AWS. We're happy to support the FastAPI ramp-up.
I see. I've been meaning to learn FastAPI. Let me think about it — the move from Zerodha would need to be worth it. Can you share the comp range?

shortlist.interest_reasoning: Siddharth is cautiously interested but concerned about the tech stack transition and needs strong financial incentives to move.

pipeline_summary: Analyzed JD for 'Senior Backend Engineer'. Screened 20 candidates, shortlisted top 5. Simulated recruiter outreach for each shortlisted candidate. Final ranking uses 60% match score + 40% interest score.
